block_01: It’s time to show off your trading skills!
block_03: Here’s your free trial account. It’s your chance to give our program a test run entirely risk-free. If you pass the test challenge, you can proceed to take on a similar assessment and get your funded account!
block_06: First, log in to your SabioDashboard. This is your main space where you can track your performance, status, assessment objectives, and possible rule breaches.
block_12: Once you logged in to the SabioDashboard, log in to your SabioTraderoom to start your trial.
block_19: If you have any questions at all, please send us an email at
block_21: Disclaimer: Trading carries a high level of risk, and may not be suitable for everyone. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Before getting involved in trading, you should carefully consider your personal objectives, level of education/experience, and risk appetite. You must be aware that the possibility exists that you could sustain a loss of some or all of your initial deposit and therefore, you should not trade with funds which you cannot afford to lose. The information contained in this email does not constitute financial advice in any form, nor is it a solicitation to buy or sell any Forex contract or securities of any type. We will not accept liability for any loss or damage, including without limitation any loss of profit, which may arise directly or indirectly from use of or reliance on such information.
